purpose: Visual registry for the Gym applied-practice arena. This registry does not own scoring or question generation.

gym.title: Applied Practice Arena
gym.purpose: The Gym tests the same selected state under pressure and transformation.
gym.rule: The Gym Leader is defeated by recognition, not force. The player must keep the same state visible under pressure.

warm_pressure.label: Warm Pressure
warm_pressure.signal: The state appears in a normal but slightly strained situation.

mixed_ohu.label: Mixed OHU
mixed_ohu.signal: The same character/form may drift across overdeveloped, healthy, or underdeveloped signals.

story_pressure.label: Story Pressure
story_pressure.signal: The state appears through a lived scene instead of a label.

gym_leader.label: Gym Leader Transformation
gym_leader.signal: Recognition must hold when the pressure presentation changes.
